---
name: Bug Report
about: Report an issue to help us improve
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the issue.

## Environment
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 125, Firefox 123, Safari 17)
- **Device**: (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Android 14)
- **App Version**: (check the "Integrity & Version" panel in the app)
- **Language**: (e.g., English, Bengali)

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., offline mode, privacy mode, specific asset type).

## Acknowledgment
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I am reporting a bug in the Zakah Calculator application itself, not a browser/OS issue
- [ ] I can reproduce the issue consistently
